abilities.description: Until end of turn, face-up, nontoken creatures you control gain "When this creature dies, manifest the top card of your library."

effect.description: Until end of turn, face-up, nontoken creatures you control gain "When this creature dies, manifest the top card of your library."
effect.name: AnimateAll

triggers.description: At the beginning of your end step, manifest the top card of your library. (Put it onto the battlefield face down as a 2/2 creature. Turn it face up any time for its mana cost if it's a creature card.)
